StepAction: Idle: runloop iteration entry; deriveObservedCondition has not yet evaluated; lastUser may or may not exist in stream
deriveObservedCondition evaluates session state and returns observed ∈ {null, overflow, cache-aware, rebind, continuation-invalidated, provider-switched, stall-recovery, manual, empty-response, idle}

Inside SessionCompaction.run: snapshotUnansweredUserMessage walks stream backward; identifies most-recent user msg with no completed-finish assistant child; copies info+parts; captures emptyAssistantID? when present
provider-switch pre-loop path (prompt.ts:1099-1146): bypasses SessionCompaction.run; calls compactWithSharedContext directly; same snapshot helper invoked here BEFORE the legacy anchor write

Anchor write: kind chain executes (low-cost-server first for codex, falls through to narrative / replay-tail / llm-agent); winning kind writes summary-true assistant message via compactWithSharedContext or tryLlmAgent inline; codex chain reset via publishCompactedAndResetChain
replayUnansweredUserMessage gate: read post-anchor state; compare snapshot.id vs anchorMessageID; decide replay path
Condition: snapshot != null AND snapshot.id < anchorMessageID AND enableUserMsgReplay == true

StepAction: Replay: generate newUserID via Identifier.ascending; Session.updateMessage with snapshot.info shape and new id; copy parts with fresh part ids targeting new message; Session.removeMessage on emptyAssistantID? then on snapshot.info.id
Skip replay: snapshot already after anchor (race); record outcome=skipped:already-after-anchor in telemetry payload
Skip replay: no unanswered user msg OR feature flag disabled; record outcome=skipped:no-unanswered in telemetry payload

Emit replay telemetry: bus event compaction.user_msg_replay; appendRecentEvent on session execution; debug.log line per AGENTS.md rule 1; thread {observed, kind} through publishCompactedAndResetChain so recentEvents records the correct observed value (not unknown)

decideContinueInjection (replaces INJECT_CONTINUE table): inspect post-anchor stream; if replayed=true OR any user msg already exists post-anchor → skip Continue; if no user msg post-anchor AND observed permits ambient continuation → call injectContinueAfterAnchor

Runloop continues: filterCompacted re-scans stream; lastUser is guaranteed non-undefined when pre-condition was met (replayed user msg has id > anchor.id); next LLM call has the user's actual question instead of synthetic Continue substitute
